A richly illustrated fantasy card is framed by an ornate gold border with intricate filigree patterns curling along all edges. At the center, a cartoonish yet sharply stylized character leaps mid-stride atop a cluster of soft, luminous clouds. The figure wears a sleek black suit with angular tailoring and a tall black top hat tilted slightly backward. Its face is bright yellow with oversized circular eyes ringed in blue and purple, giving a hypnotic, playful intensity. A wide grin stretches across its face, with a long gray tongue curling outward in a loose, animated arc.

One arm extends outward in a carefree gesture, while the other lifts a glowing blue cocktail glass that emits stylized bursts of golden light. Surrounding the character is a vivid cosmic backdrop filled with swirling galaxies, radiant nebulae in reds, oranges, and purples, and scattered golden coins drifting through space. The sense of motion is heightened by the character’s lifted foot and the buoyant clouds beneath, suggesting weightless movement.

Below the central illustration, a decorative panel displays the title “Trickster” in bold serif lettering. Beneath it, four labeled attributes appear with iconography: Power [40], Defense [25], Intelligence [70], and Magical skills [55]. The entire composition blends playful cartoon energy with high fantasy card design, balancing whimsy with ornate detail.
